exploit it for their own benefit. It is because such lazy people do
not have inclination to do any work, because of their laziness and
lethargy.
PLANETARYCOMBINATION:-Combinationofsatumand
Dragon Head in the natal chart is the cause of such inclinations.
Therefore such children should be given suitable work, depending
on their physique. The result will be that they will be able to
develop and prosper well in such fields. They must be advised that
whatever comforts and facilities that prevail when they are
children will not last long and they have to stand on their own feet
when they grow up.
We are all aware of the story ofValmiki, the great poet
who composed Ramayana, was a butcher in his earlier life.
Because of the Guidance and advice he received he became the
eternal poet of the world. In the same manner, many persons in
this world have become great, as they received suitable guidance
and advice at the appropriate time.
